category.name: zoo.window.shopCageInfo
category.item: Meadow
Luscious, green tufts of grass in a pleasant summer meadow. All animals that like grass and relax in the sun feel good here.
Water

Splash! The enclosure with the pool is alive. Not only flamingos, but also other aquatic animals and various types of fish are having their own party there. The enclosure with the water surface is the party location among the enclosures!
Ice
Penguins, polar bears and co. feel really good in the artificially created glacial landscape in the winter enclosure. Brrr, make sure you have fresh fish and a warm blanket.
Savanna
The high temperatures that prevail in the savannah provide great conditions for animals from the African continent. They enjoy the heat!
Desert
Where is the nearest oasis? The desert gets really hot during the day and cools down quickly at night. The desert animals are happy, but what about the visitors?
Rocks
Small animals can hide nicely among the rocks. Larger animals have a harder time. At least they can find tasty prey among the rocks.
Bamboo grove
Your animals' home is now an elegant bamboo grove. This enclosure will earn you even more experience points than usual.
Swamp

A swamp like this is teeming with various animals. Some like to roll around in the mud, others hunt insects and worms from the slimy substance. This enclosure will earn you even more experience points than usual.
Tundra
Life in the tundra is harsh, but the animals have adapted optimally. It's cold here, but the mosses and lichens from the tundra taste delicious!
Snow
Winter, winter, it's snowing! Especially animals with really thick fur feel really good in a snowy enclosure.
Wasteland
You'll hardly believe it: Many animals also feel good in the desert, and it doesn't always have to be beautiful nature. The animals that survive in the desert have adapted perfectly.
Halloween

Slimy, gooey and terrifying: On horror nights, the wasteland turns into an inhospitable landscape where terrifying characters roam. Never before have there been so many experience points: This enclosure is at the highest level from the start.
Christmas

Not only do the children's eyes shine, but also the festively decorated enclosures. The animals also enjoy the colorful lights and sweet lollipops. There have never been so many experience points: This enclosure has been at the highest level from the start.
Romance

Love is in the air ... but also in your enclosures. Everything invites romantic moments. If you have a male and a female in the enclosure, then each new attempt to add a new animal takes only half the time than in other enclosures.
Primeval forest
Can you hear how life is here? The jungle is full of sounds. Animals big and small live together harmoniously here. A big family! This enclosure will bring you even more experience points than usual.
Terrarium
A place where reptiles feel great. Visitors can also admire them up close.
Easter enclosure
It's not just rabbits who are in their element here. Especially at Easter, the grass is a real pleasure!
Birthday run
Traditional! It doesn't get any more colorful than this! This new enclosure will put you in the right birthday mood! Happy birthday! The party is starting!
Crypt
All the little Halloween ghosts will feel right at home in this spooky graveyard. Bring a little terror to your Zoo.
Christmas miracle
This will be the first animal Christmas! Festively decorated enclosures will bring a smile to the faces of both people and animals.
Fairytale enclosure
Great! This fantasy enclosure will give your zoo a fairytale atmosphere and increase its appeal. Hopefully no golden balls fall into the well!
Australian outback - range
This habitat is a carbon copy of the Australian outback - mysterious, dry and quiet. Your animals are going to flip their lids!
Ruins in the jungle
These long-abandoned ruins are shrouded in mystery. The animals that live there offer very good protection!
Party enclosure
Up for a wild zoo party: Zoomumba's second birthday needs to be celebrated in style - and in the party enclosure! Hip, hip, hooray!
Bonsai enclosure
Is your zoo too noisy? Then it's time for some Zen meditation with a cup of tea in the bonsai enclosure.
Oktoberfest - amusement park
Oktoberfest has just begun! Great beer gardens and the rustic atmosphere of Bavaria - it's time to start having fun! Put on your leather pants and let the beer flow!
Volcanic range
The hot lava makes this enclosure a particularly warm place, and some animals are perfectly fine with that.
Winter magic
Turn your zoo into a winter wonderland. Whether they have feathers, claws or paws, your animals love building snowmen!
Love spell
Be my valentine! Love has spread to animal shelters. Oh, that's beautiful!
Happy love
The perfect place for romance! Your pets can serenade each other right here! However, if there are new members joining the family, that will have to wait.
Fjords
Connecting with nature is the essence of spring. The fjord environment has pure nature - fresh air and glacial water.
Heavenly habitat
This is a true paradise - the trees look like lollipops and the river flows with honey! A perfect treat!
Easter meadow
Do you like to hunt for eggs at Easter? This meadow is full of small colorful eggs.
Warm greetings from Russia
Your animals love playing fetch among the onion domes of a Russian temple. They get so warm that they don't even mind the harsh Russian winter!
Garden for recreation
A nice haven for your animals. There's definitely room for a garden gnome among those trees and flowers, right?
Vineyard
The excellent French wines are known all over the world. Your animals will feel at home in the mild climate of these idyllic slopes.
Birthday party - paddock
Long live ZooMumba! It's time to start celebrating: we've got cake, balloons and lots of fun for young and old - and for your animals!
Puszta - paddock
A pasture with vegetation is a fantastic enclosure for many animals. In Hungary, this landscape is dotted with shepherds, cute farmhouses and typical wells.
Alps
Yay! Your animals are attracted to green meadows and herbs on the mountains and in the valleys. The mountains will get higher and rockier with each level! How exciting!
Horror run
Aaah! A voracious, five-headed plant surrounds the animals in this small horror enclosure. It's hungry, but don't worry, animals aren't on its menu. But your visitors should beware.
Cottage animal enclosure
Celebrate Thanksgiving in a cozy country cottage surrounded by cornfields. The perfect place to relax!
Under the tree
A colorful Christmas tree with gifts for your animals - will they open them with their claws, beaks or teeth? Whatever they use, they will definitely be happy!
Cave
Many animals like to dig their own dens. With each level, this enclosure will get deeper and deeper. What might be hidden down there? Stalactites? Cave paintings? Maybe even gems?
1001 nights
Pamper your animals in this tent, where they will feel like they are in the Arabian Nights. It is a true oriental oasis!
Oasis of health
Need a massage? The health and well-being of your animals is a top priority at this oasis. A bubble bath and candles? What could be better?
Forest
Many animals prefer to live in the forest. With each level, more and more trees will grow. Coniferous and deciduous trees, shrubs and bushes will create the perfect place to hide!
Spring run
Fresh spring scents and budding flowers all around: In the spring enclosure, your animals will enjoy fresh leaves and sprouting buds. And there's even a bubbling stream!
Coastal enclosure
Fresh air and sea breeze! Many animals feel very comfortable in coastal areas - the sound of the ocean and the rocky cliffs offer an idyllic environment.
Magic mushroom enclosure
Offer your visitors a vibrant world full of fantasy. With each level, this mushroom will grow upwards.
Sugar Land
You can laze around all day in a land full of cotton candy and marshmallows. Pearl decorations and candied fruit make this run even sweeter!
Samba paddock
Colorful houses and graffiti decorate the cities of Brazil. In this enclosure, your animals will be surrounded by residential buildings.
Amazon rainforest
The Amazon rainforest dominates a large part of Brazil. Your animals can bathe in the Amazon among the tropical plants. Shh! They say there are many undiscovered animals there. How exciting!
Picnic meadow
A blanket, plates, glasses... these are the basic equipment for a picnic basket. Head to the picnic meadow and enjoy a birthday snack in nature!
Ghost Hour
The twelfth hour has struck and ghosts are emerging from the catacombs to haunt all around.
Snow landscape
Freshly fallen snow and a small cottage in the distance create a beautiful winter landscape.
Hawaiian abode
Aloha! A touch of the South Pacific with palm trees and white beaches. Send your pets on a romantic getaway to paradise: complete with the sounds of the waves and decorative garlands!
Karl Karl
Karlu Karlu is a sacred place for the natives and translates to "round rocks." They are commonly called "devil's balls."
Whomping Willow
The limbs of the weeping willow hang in the pale moonlight on eerie nights. Young wizards hide around in mysterious caves.
Emergency landing
Santa's sleigh landed hard in the snow, but your animals are already looking forward to the presents that have been scattered around. Hooray!
A place of love
There's always love floating over this pretty pond. It's the perfect place for your pets to snuggle up and watch the sunset.
Small ice mass
Brr... it's cold! Ice lovers will feel right at home here.
Large water tank
Let's go for a swim! Here your aquatic animals will find plenty of space to swim, dive and splash!
Easter Garden
There's plenty of room to hide Easter eggs in this spring enclosure, and your animals will have a blast searching for them.
Small water tank
An ideal habitat for smaller fish. Visitors can look forward to a real spectacle.
Medium water tank
Splash splash! Your aquatic animals will have a good time swimming in this tank.
Medium-sized ice mass
Quick, put on another sweater! Your animals can look forward to sub-zero temperatures in this frozen habitat.
Vast ice mass
Get ready for the cold! Animals with love for sub-zero temperatures will be grateful for this icy paradise.
Small pirate bay
Your fish will love swimming in this bay! What treasures might be hidden here?
Medium pirate bay
In this bay, there's enough space for fish of all shapes and sizes!
Large pirate bay
There's definitely a pirate treasure hiding at the bottom of this bay! Your animals may discover it!
Small expedition tank
Pack your gear and get ready to dive into the depths. Found something? Hurry! Or the animals will overtake you!
Small coral reef
Look at the vivid colors of the coral reef! This exotic environment is ideal for the tropical fish!
Medium coral reef
This tropical reef is filled with corals of all colors and sizes! Each animal will find a happy home here.
Great Coral Reef
This coral reef is teeming with life and offers plenty of space for all aquatic animals. Watch them have fun!
Small Caribbean island
Sun and water - the perfect combination. Your animals will love this summer retreat.
Central Caribbean island
Nothing beats walking on the white sand under the shade of palm trees. Your animals are gonna love this island!
Large caribbean island
You won't be able to get your animals off this island! How about packing up and moving too!
Medium Tiki creek
Lie down in a hammock, sip mango juice and enjoy Tiki Bay to the fullest. There is simply no better way to relax!
Medium expedition tank
Your visitors will be curious to see what you pull out of this tank! Your animals will also enjoy swimming among the machinery.
Large expedition tank
This tank is so big you could fit the Titanic in it! Your largest animals and fish will also have plenty of room to explore the crevices and cracks.
Small Tiki creek
The vibrant colors and clear water will attract not only different species of fish and animals, but also new visitors!
Large Tiki creek
Relax in a tropical environment, enjoy the tranquility and watch the animals frolic in the water.
Model railway
Your animals are gonna love climbing this train and railway! Don't forget to take your visitors for a ride!
Spider cave
Are you brave enough to step into this dark cave? Don't worry. The spider that lives there is very friendly and just wants to give you a hug.
North Pole
Visit Santa's home at the North Pole! Your animals will have a lot of fun building snowmen and creating snow angels!
Romantic reservoir
Even fish crave love! Place this romantic tank in the Underwater World and make your water creatures happy.
Temple ruin
Head to the tropical rainforest of Cambodia and sit under a tetrameles tree. If you get lucky, you might even spot a sun bear.
Spring garden
Spring is here! Put on your shoes, grab your watering can, it's time to take care of your garden!
Elegant habitat
Introduce this luxurious habitat to your animals. You'll see how they'll love it!
